title: clematis horripilata
intro: Clematis horripilata is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Clematis horripilata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Herbal preparations of Clematis horripilata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it.
